title: Bridge Essay: Nondual Awareness and Minimal Phenomenal Experience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Nondual Awareness and Minimal Phenomenal Experience.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 32973628. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2020.02087. Minimal phenomenal experiences (MPEs) have recently gained attention in the fields of neuroscience and philosophy of mind. They can be thought of as episodes of greatly reduced or even absent phenomenal content together with areduced level of arousal. It has also been proposed that MPEs are cases of consciousness-as-such. Here, we present adifferent perspective, that consciousness-as-such is first and foremost atype of awareness, that is, non-conceptual, non-propositional, and nondual, in oth...
